title: Marketing Manager - Healthcare (m/w/d)
summary: Candidate has strong strategic product marketing credentials (positioning, competitive analysis, GTM, 4+ years B2B) that align with the role's product marketing pillar. However, the role places heavy emphasis on hands-on digital execution — HubSpot, Google/LinkedIn Ads, GA4, SEO/SEA, and marketing automation — none of which appear in the candidate's toolset. German fluency is listed as required but candidate is at B1+, representing a meaningful risk for a Munich-based HealthTech role.
recommended_emphasis: Highlight product positioning, competitive analysis, and market segmentation experience as direct match to the strategic product marketing scope
Emphasize multi-market GTM execution (EMEA/APAC) and KPI/ROI reporting to demonstrate analytical and campaign management capability
Stress any exposure to B2B lead generation, sales enablement collateral, or demand generation workflows
Reference any CRM or marketing tool usage (even adjacent tools like Power BI for funnel analysis) to partially address the automation gap
Mention any healthcare, MedTech, or digital health adjacency from education at Leuphana or project work
missing_skills: HubSpot or comparable marketing automation platform (required)
Google Ads and LinkedIn Ads — paid performance marketing execution (required)
GA4 / conversion tracking and performance KPI analysis (required)
Business-level German fluency — candidate is B1+, role requires fließend (required)
risk_flags: German language gap: B1+ vs. required 'fließendes Deutsch' — likely disqualifying for a Munich-based startup role
No digital marketing execution tools in CV (HubSpot, Google Ads, GA4, SEO) — role is hands-on, not purely strategic
No healthcare industry experience mentioned — listed as 'von Vorteil' but relevant for HealthTech positioning credibility
Match score below 50: company size lookup via LinkedIn skipped per policy
